series_metadata.series_title: Applications for waiver of testing-CDL licensing for current & former military personnel
series_metadata.series_description: This record series consists of BMV 2070 "Application for Skills Test Military Exception" and BMV 2071 "Application for Military Even Exchange Waiver" forms. Both forms provide similar program of benefits for military waivers for CDL testing for qualified current and former military personnel. The forms may contain the person’s full name, address, city, state, zip code, date of birth, Driver’s license number, and military service information.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain in the BMV database for two years plus current year and then destroy. ; Paper: Retain completed document until after verification of imaged documents, then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
